auth.label: API Token
auth.description: ProxiedMail API token used with the Token header. Copy it from the ProxiedMail Settings API page: https://proxiedmail.com/en/settings.

actions.name: create_proxy_binding
actions.description: Create a ProxiedMail proxy email binding that forwards to real addresses.

realAddresses.description: Real email addresses that should receive mail forwarded from the proxy address.

proxyAddress.description: The proxy email address ProxiedMail should issue.

anyOf.description: A callback URL ProxiedMail should call when new mail arrives.

callbackUrl.description: The callback URL ProxiedMail should call when new mail arrives, or an empty string.

isBrowsable.description: Whether received emails should be listable through the API.

inputSchema.description: Input for creating a ProxiedMail proxy binding.

usedProxyBindings.description: The number of proxy bindings used by the account.

availableProxyBindings.description: The number of proxy bindings available to the account.

isVerificationEmailSend.description: Whether ProxiedMail sent a verification email.

firstProxyBinding.description: Whether this response is for the account's first proxy binding.

meta.description: Metadata returned with proxy binding responses.

type.description: The JSON:API resource type, usually proxy_bindings.

is_enabled.description: Whether forwarding to this real address is enabled.

is_verified.description: Whether this real address has been verified.

is_verification_needed.description: Whether ProxiedMail reports verification is still needed.

additionalProperties.description: Status metadata for one real forwarding address.

real_addresses.description: Real forwarding addresses keyed by email address.

received_emails.description: The number of received emails for this proxy binding.

callback_url.description: The callback URL ProxiedMail calls when new mail arrives.

is_browsable.description: Whether received emails can be listed with the API.

created_at.description: The date and time when ProxiedMail created this proxy binding.

updated_at.description: The date and time when ProxiedMail last updated this proxy binding.

type.description: The internal ProxiedMail binding type code.

attributes.description: Attributes of a ProxiedMail proxy binding.

relationships.description: The raw object returned by ProxiedMail.

raw.description: The raw object returned by ProxiedMail.

outputSchema.description: The response returned after creating a ProxiedMail proxy binding.

actions.name: get_received_email
actions.description: Get the payload and metadata for one ProxiedMail received email.

receivedEmailId.description: The ProxiedMail received email ID to fetch.

inputSchema.description: Input for fetching one ProxiedMail received email.

type.description: The JSON:API resource type, usually received_emails_details.

recipient_email.description: The proxy email address that received the message.

payload.description: The message payload returned by ProxiedMail.

attachments.description: Attachments returned by ProxiedMail for this received email.

is_processed.description: Whether ProxiedMail has processed the received email.

created_at.description: The date and time when ProxiedMail created the received email record.

updated_at.description: The date and time when ProxiedMail last updated the received email record.

raw.description: The raw object returned by ProxiedMail.

outputSchema.description: The response returned when fetching one ProxiedMail received email.

actions.name: list_proxy_bindings
actions.description: List ProxiedMail proxy email bindings for the connected account.

inputSchema.description: No input is required for listing ProxiedMail proxy bindings.

usedProxyBindings.description: The number of proxy bindings used by the account.

availableProxyBindings.description: The number of proxy bindings available to the account.

isVerificationEmailSend.description: Whether ProxiedMail sent a verification email.

firstProxyBinding.description: Whether this response is for the account's first proxy binding.

meta.description: Metadata returned with proxy binding responses.

type.description: The JSON:API resource type, usually proxy_bindings.

is_enabled.description: Whether forwarding to this real address is enabled.

is_verified.description: Whether this real address has been verified.

is_verification_needed.description: Whether ProxiedMail reports verification is still needed.

additionalProperties.description: Status metadata for one real forwarding address.

real_addresses.description: Real forwarding addresses keyed by email address.

received_emails.description: The number of received emails for this proxy binding.

callback_url.description: The callback URL ProxiedMail calls when new mail arrives.

is_browsable.description: Whether received emails can be listed with the API.

created_at.description: The date and time when ProxiedMail created this proxy binding.

updated_at.description: The date and time when ProxiedMail last updated this proxy binding.

type.description: The internal ProxiedMail binding type code.

attributes.description: Attributes of a ProxiedMail proxy binding.

relationships.description: The raw object returned by ProxiedMail.

proxyBindings.description: The proxy bindings returned by ProxiedMail.

raw.description: The raw object returned by ProxiedMail.

outputSchema.description: The response returned when listing ProxiedMail proxy bindings.

actions.name: list_received_email_links
actions.description: List received-email links for a browsable ProxiedMail proxy binding.

proxyBindingId.description: The ProxiedMail proxy binding ID whose messages to list.

inputSchema.description: Input for listing ProxiedMail received-email links.

type.description: The JSON:API resource type, usually received_emails_link.

recipient_email.description: The proxy email address that received the message.

attachmentsCounter.description: The number of attachments reported by ProxiedMail.

link.description: The API path for fetching the received email payload.

is_processed.description: Whether ProxiedMail has processed the received email.

created_at.description: The date and time when ProxiedMail created the received email record.

updated_at.description: The date and time when ProxiedMail last updated the received email record.

attributes.description: Attributes for a ProxiedMail received-email link.

receivedEmailLinks.description: The received-email links returned by ProxiedMail.

raw.description: The raw object returned by ProxiedMail.

outputSchema.description: The response returned when listing ProxiedMail received-email links.

actions.name: update_proxy_binding
actions.description: Update a ProxiedMail proxy email binding by ID.

proxyBindingId.description: The ProxiedMail proxy binding ID to update.

additionalProperties.description: Whether this real forwarding address should be enabled.

realAddresses.description: Real forwarding addresses keyed by email address with true to enable and false to disable.

proxyAddress.description: The proxy email address for this binding.

description.description: The free-form description for this proxy binding.

anyOf.description: A callback URL ProxiedMail should call when new mail arrives.

callbackUrl.description: The callback URL ProxiedMail should call when new mail arrives, or an empty string to clear it.

isBrowsable.description: Whether received emails should be listable through the API.

inputSchema.description: Input for updating a ProxiedMail proxy binding.

usedProxyBindings.description: The number of proxy bindings used by the account.

availableProxyBindings.description: The number of proxy bindings available to the account.

isVerificationEmailSend.description: Whether ProxiedMail sent a verification email.

firstProxyBinding.description: Whether this response is for the account's first proxy binding.

meta.description: Metadata returned with proxy binding responses.

type.description: The JSON:API resource type, usually proxy_bindings.

is_enabled.description: Whether forwarding to this real address is enabled.

is_verified.description: Whether this real address has been verified.

is_verification_needed.description: Whether ProxiedMail reports verification is still needed.

additionalProperties.description: Status metadata for one real forwarding address.

real_addresses.description: Real forwarding addresses keyed by email address.

received_emails.description: The number of received emails for this proxy binding.

callback_url.description: The callback URL ProxiedMail calls when new mail arrives.

is_browsable.description: Whether received emails can be listed with the API.

created_at.description: The date and time when ProxiedMail created this proxy binding.

updated_at.description: The date and time when ProxiedMail last updated this proxy binding.

type.description: The internal ProxiedMail binding type code.

attributes.description: Attributes of a ProxiedMail proxy binding.

relationships.description: The raw object returned by ProxiedMail.

raw.description: The raw object returned by ProxiedMail.

outputSchema.description: The response returned after updating a ProxiedMail proxy binding.
